text.title: Support Tool Pm Triage Spec Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Support Tool Pm Triage Spec.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS Intercom spec: tags bug / feature / billing / docs / praise. Escalation: billing → email @ruslan instantly; bug+p0 → Slack ping; feature ×3 in 7d → flag for triage. Friday digest: top 5 quotes each.
